mission.title: Install and Configure Tremor on Kubernetes
mission.description: Tremor is an event- or stream-processing system designed for high-volumetric data, providing low latency and efficient resource usage. Installing Tremor allows you to handle ETL workloads effectively, making it a valuable tool for data processing in production environments.

steps.title: Install Tremor via Docker
steps.description:
Run Tremor using the official Docker image:
```bash
docker pull tremorproject/tremor:0.13.0-rc.32
docker run -ti --rm tremorproject/tremor:0.13.0-rc.32 tremor --version
```

steps.title: Install Tremor binary (alternative)
steps.description:
Download the Tremor binary:
```bash
# See https://tremor.rs/docs/0.12/getting-started/install
curl -Lo tremor https://github.com/tremor-rs/tremor-runtime/releases/latest/download/tremor-linux-amd64
chmod +x tremor
sudo mv tremor /usr/local/bin/
```

steps.title: Create a simple pipeline

uninstall.title: Remove Tremor
uninstall.description:
```bash
sudo rm /usr/local/bin/tremor
# Or stop Docker container
docker stop tremor
```

upgrade.title: Or download latest binary
upgrade.description:
```bash
curl -Lo tremor https://github.com/tremor-rs/tremor-runtime/releases/latest/download/tremor-linux-amd64
chmod +x tremor
sudo mv tremor /usr/local/bin/
```

troubleshooting.title: Pipeline syntax errors
troubleshooting.description:
Tremor has its own language (Troy/Trickle). Use the LSP for IDE support:
```bash
tremor server run
```

troubleshooting.title: Kafka connector not connecting
troubleshooting.description: Check the connector configuration and ensure Kafka is reachable from the Tremor process.

troubleshooting.title: High memory usage under load
troubleshooting.description: Tune circuit breaker and backpressure settings in your pipeline definition.

resolution.summary: Tremor is installed as an event processing system for high-volume data streaming and ETL workloads.

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have kubectl installed and configured to communicate with your Kubernetes cluster.
